name: demo
description: 2-gear handoff: Pi PM assigns a request -> Pi Coding Agent executes it. Proves the orchestrator + the git/handoff baton end-to-end.

steps.message: Read ./pipeline/REQUEST.md. Write a Sabbk-compliant handoff to ./spike/workdir/pi-coding-spike/INBOX-handoff.md that assigns the request to agent pi-coding-spike. Use the handoff schema (YAML frontmatter from: pi-pm, to: pi-coding-spike, date, tier: 2, playbook: software, phase: BUILD, priority) + a Summary, Facts, and an Actions Needed checklist. Cite Playbook + Phase. Do not do the coding work yourself.
Your assignment is in ./INBOX-handoff.md. Execute it via your spec->plan->build->validate pipeline.
